next_steps: Perform lumbar puncture for cerebrospinal fluid analysis (if clinical stability permits)
Consider urgent red cell exchange transfusion for stabilization of sickle cell disease
Review of all current medications to identify potential neurotoxic triggers

differential_diagnoses: CNS infection (meningoencephalitis in the setting of asplenia)
next_steps: Perform lumbar puncture for CSF analysis including culture and cytology
Urgent infectious disease, neurology, and hematology consultation
Comprehensive review of medication history for potential neurotoxic triggers
